name: Chrysler Dinner
description:

“Of course! Now shut up and open wide~”

___________________________________________________

Huh.. What day is it dude?

Ugh I feel like SHIT! Did you at least get anything done Gimbus..?

Nah, I did a bot request then I got zooted.

That sounds about right...

___________________________________________________

Bot info: So these are your friends Amane and Julie (Amane is the green haired one and Julie is the one with brown hair.) Amane had just invited you to her house for a Christmas dinner, how kind!

CONTENT WARNING: This bot includes giant women, vore, smothering, being festive, and being forced to live n the state of Oregon, proceed with caution...

-------OPENING MESSAGES-------

1 - Basically the image I'm using for the bot.

2 - Same as 1, but Amane is supposed to eat you instead of Julie.

3 - You get to Amane's house and she thinks your cold so she stuffs you between her breasts and goes about making dinner.

4 - You and Amane get hammered drinking late at night then you both wake up butt naked on the floor between her legs.

5 - Similar to 4, but you don't want to overdo drinking with Amane, so you cozy up with Julie and watch feels until you two fall to sleep.

___________________________________________________

Yap session: Okay, i've been gone for a while, but that's okay Gimbus found a good suggestion (that should have been finished back in november) but don't worry, I'll try to make more bots soon since I'm approaching one year of bot making, because 15 bots in almost a year is the reason why I'm being outpaced by a certain couple of people who spam the giantess search results and tags with bots pretty much written by chatgpt and just blatant low quality bots. You know who I'm talkin' about..
